summary: Visual verification testing for paused automation indicators and font size regression. FIXED critical bug - disabled_automations field was missing from Contact model causing paused visual indicators not to display. Also fixed API undefined error in toggleAutomation function.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Contact model missing disabled_automations field - API was not returning the field causing frontend paused visual indicators not to display
toggleAutomation function used undefined 'API' variable causing 'ReferenceError: API is not defined' when clicking Pause/Resume Auto-Card
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed from fetch with '${API}' to use 'api.patch()' from the imported axios instance

paused_automation_visual_indicators.details: After fix, paused automation chips (May 10 sold_date) correctly display: orange pause-circle icon, grey text (#999), strikethrough text, orange-tinted border

toggle_automation_feature.details: Clicking automation chip shows action sheet with Edit Date/Pause Auto-Card options. Toggle correctly changes visual state from active (red/pink) to paused (grey/strikethrough) and back

font_size_regression_contact_page.details: Contact page Feed and Details tabs display readable text with no overflow issues

font_size_regression_inbox.details: Inbox page renders properly - header 28px, conversation items 16px, timestamps 13px. No overflow detected

font_size_regression_activity.details: Activity page renders properly - header 28px, contact names 14px, timestamps 11px. No overflow detected

context_for_next_testing_agent: Paused automation visual indicators now working correctly after adding disabled_automations to Contact model. May 10 (sold_date) is currently paused for Forest Ward contact. The toggleAutomation function now uses the correct api axios instance.
